message:
🐛 Allow demo-only cards to show demo data when agent offline (#482)

Cards that explicitly show demo data (isDemoData=true) should display
their demo content even when agent is offline and demo mode is OFF.

The previous fix forced all "live" cards to show skeleton, but some
demo-only cards use useCardLoadingState and were incorrectly hidden.

Now we check if a card is showing demo data before forcing skeleton.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
